novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: The drafter emitted no named literature checklist mapping 4-10 papers to §8 statements; reviewer had to reconstruct it from §5.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: Add an explicit comparison to Luo and Geng 2016 as the no-proxy direct/indirect-bound ancestor identified by HanLuoZhangGu2026.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The certificate R >= Delta/L is undefined when the finite Lipschitz constant L_{E,s}(P) is zero; add L>0 or a zero-denominator convention.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Emit the required 4-10 paper checklist with one-line claims and §8 mapping, including DukesShpitserTchetgen2023, GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023, ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023, MilesKankiMeloniTchetgen2017, CaiKurokiPearlTian2008, GabrielSachsSjolander2023, DingVanderWeele2016, and HanLuoZhangGu2026.
Patch Conjecture 2 by explicitly handling L_{E,s}=0 and empty endpoint-hull boundary cases before stating the lower certificate.
Sharpen Conjecture 1 with an invariant formulation showing the zonotope and endpoint-attainability criterion do not depend on the chosen reference bridge h^0 or scaling/sign of the null vector nu.
Add a minimal binary example with two proxy-null cells whose PNDE and TNIE endpoint selectors disagree, so the missing-corner claim is visibly non-rectangular rather than generic LP language.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal by adding the missing literature checklist and patching Conjecture 2's zero-denominator certificate condition; no novelty pivot is needed.
